Computer Science undergraduate at Lovely Professional University, crafting scalable, high-performance solutions across the full stack. With a strong command of data structures and algorithmic thinking, I build systems that balance technical precision with seamless user experience—ranging from real-time communication platforms to intelligent, NLP-driven applications.

Real-Time Chat Box
